top.title: PAAN
top.description: Corporate site of PAAN Co., Ltd. Bridging cultures through food, with the power of technology and artificial intelligence.
top.hero_title: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered.
top.hero_sub:
The dishes we wish to taste, the drinks we long for, the aromas we wish to feel, the tables we wish to touch.
The walls of language and culture between them, we shall surmount with technology and artificial intelligence.
top.news_2026_06_03_release: PAAN Co., Ltd. will be founded.
top.news_2026_05_10_info: Our corporate website is now live.
top.news_2026_04_18_story: On the Hokuriku Shinkansen home, returning from a day trip to Iwase, Toyama. The co-founders resolved to establish PAAN Co., Ltd.

mission.title: PAAN
mission.description: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered. Restaurants have crossed borders, but dishes have not. Through technology and AI, we bridge cultures through food.
mission.page_title:
Crossing the walls of language and culture,
we open the road to dishes yet to be seen.
mission.question_h: Restaurants have crossed borders. But dishes?
mission.question_p1: Michelin, Tabelog, TripAdvisor. — Over a hundred years, the "information" about restaurants has spread across the world. And yet, the dishes themselves have not yet crossed over.
mission.question_p2: Even when you stand in the place itself, you halt before the menu. You order something you already know — and only when you glance at the next table's plate do you realise. ── Are we truly meeting the dishes we longed for?
mission.regrets_h: The many regrets that stand before the meal.
mission.story1_lead: The long-awaited overseas trip — and the very first dinner.
mission.story1_p: You gather your courage and step into a restaurant featured in the guidebook. You open the menu. ── You cannot picture what will arrive. In the end, half-doubting, you order. The dish that comes is nothing like you imagined — a wry smile escapes you. Glancing at the next table's plate, you murmur, "that's what I really wanted to eat."
mission.story_coda: — A night standing still before a street stall's sign. A night when the drink you longed for never appeared. A meal slowly given up on, in the face of dietary needs. A restaurateur who cannot properly welcome the foreign guest who has just passed under the noren. These regrets — these we take on.
mission.approach_h: Beyond the wall, we open the road.
mission.approach_p1: The walls to be crossed are not one. The wall of language. The wall of culture. And the wall of distance. It is what stands in the way of the connection between information and people, and of access to the dishes themselves.
mission.approach_p2: With the power of technology and AI, we open the road, one by one. Through food, we move towards a world where people and people, culture and culture, meet one step more deeply.
mission.first_h: Our first challenge: beyond the menu.
mission.first_p1: The other side of the menu — it is a world of dishes that words alone cannot reach.
mission.first_p2: We dissolve the "I cannot read it", "I do not understand it" — the unease that flows through the world — with the power of technology and AI. Not a mere literal translation, but a "translation" rooted in the food culture of the user's mother tongue. Cultural context with each explanation, and illustrative images. All from a single photo of the menu — right there, before you.
mission.first_p3: This is the first step of our larger vision. Crossing the walls of language and culture, we open the road to dishes yet to be seen.

brand.title: PAAN
brand.description: Products by PAAN Co., Ltd. We are preparing a series of scene-specific products to realise encounters — between people, between cultures — through food.
brand.menupaan_tagline: Answering the regrets before the meal — with products.
brand.menupaan_desc: PAAN Co., Ltd. holds the vision of answering, one by one with products, the many regrets that stand before the meal. Details of each product, including the first, will be announced when the time is right.
brand.menupaan_feature_func_value: AI-driven understanding of dishes, cultural-context translation
brand.others_name: PAAN Series, second product and beyond
brand.others_desc: A night when you meet the drink you longed for. The encounter between local spirits and the very dish they belong to. A night when the host welcomes, without hesitation, guests with dietary needs or convictions. And a proper guidance for the foreign guest who has stepped under the noren. ── Answering, one by one with products, the regrets we set out in our mission — that is the PAAN Series, which we shall roll out in turn.

company.title: PAAN
company.description: Company information and officers of PAAN Co., Ltd.
company.biz_1_sub: Services that build bridges between cultures through food, including for inbound travellers.
company.biz_2_sub: Stock management, order management, multilingual menus, and other operational support systems
company.biz_3_sub: SaaS selection and implementation guidance, operational design, consultation on digitalisation
company.biz_4_sub: Planning and development of products that bring forth the next generation of food experiences, alongside research in AI-driven understanding of dishes and cultural-context translation.
company.founder_inui_bio:
Born in July 1996. Graduated from Keio Senior High School in 2015 and from Keio University, Faculty of Law (Political Science), in 2019. Joined the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan as a career-track officer, serving on the Korea and Philippines desks at headquarters, before being posted to the Embassy of Japan in the United Kingdom as Attaché and later Second Secretary, where he handled economic and diplomatic affairs.

In June 2025, he left the Ministry to take up the position of Managing Director (fourth generation) at Kushinobo Co., Ltd., a kushikatsu specialist restaurant group founded in 1950. His experience as a diplomat and as a restaurateur led to the conception of the Company's business.

Co-founded PAAN Co., Ltd. in June 2026.
company.founder_yui_bio:
Born July 1996. Graduated from Keio Senior High School in 2015. While studying at the Faculty of Law, Keio University, passed the preliminary bar examination in 2018, and the bar examination the following year.

Upon registration as a lawyer (Daini Tokyo Bar Association) in 2021, joined ZeLo, Law Office, specialising in start-up finance, public affairs and general corporate matters, providing legal advisory drawing on both public- and private-sector insight. After serving in the Innovation and Environmental Policy Bureau of the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (Innovation and New Business Development Office), joined Fugen Law Office.

In June 2026, co-founded PAAN Co., Ltd.

contact.title: PAAN
contact.description: Get in touch with PAAN Co., Ltd. We welcome enquiries on partnership, media, and future recruitment.
contact.lead: For partnerships, media enquiries and other matters, please contact us at the email address below. Once we have reviewed your message, a member of our team will respond.
contact.email_note: We aim to respond within three business days (Mon-Fri, excluding public holidays). For urgent matters, or if you do not receive a reply within a reasonable time, we kindly ask you to send your message again.
contact.inquiry_1_body: We welcome partnerships with restaurants, travel and tourism providers, local governments, media, and companies in the translation and AI sectors.
contact.inquiry_2_body: For press, articles, and speaking engagements, please include your outlet, scope, and proposed dates.
contact.inquiry_3_body: We are not currently engaged in regular recruitment. Should you be interested in joining us, please reach out with a brief summary of your background. We may be able to get back to you when we begin hiring.
contact.inquiry_4_body: For enquiries about our products, please contact us at the email address above.
